overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city with neon-lit buildings, wet reflective streets, and massive digital billboards. The footage shows first-person perspective gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from a covered commercial plaza across a multi-lane street and along a palm-lined urban sidewalk.

overhead structural canopy with embedded lighting
horizontal cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling structure
large illuminated advertising screen on the right building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial plaza with wet reflective tile flooring. The Daito storefront is prominent on the left with illuminated displays, while cyan neon beams run overhead and a digital billboard glows on the right building.

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide wet street marked with prominent yellow stripes. A dark vehicle passes by on the left as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk, with glass office towers rising on the right and neon-lit buildings on the left.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with illuminated palm trees and hedges on the left. The camera passes a large digital billboard while an overhead neon structure spans the street ahead, and occasional vehicles drive by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban corridor with high-rise advertisements

tall building with numerous lit windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: Proceeding deeper into the city corridor with taller buildings and denser pedestrian traffic ahead. Passing by various neon storefronts on the left while the overhead neon structure draws closer, and a distinctive pedestrian in a green jacket passes by closely on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered commercial plaza out into the dense, neon-drenched corridors of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding across wet reflective tiles beneath cyan neon beams, passing the illuminated displays of a Daito storefront and a glowing digital billboard. As the camera leaves the plaza, the scene shifts to a wide wet street marked with yellow stripes, crossing past a dark vehicle toward a skyline of glass office towers and neon buildings. The movement then transitions onto a wet concrete sidewalk lined with glowing palm trees and hedges, passing another massive digital billboard as an overhead neon structure looms ahead. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the urban corridor, passing various neon storefronts and a pedestrian in a green jacket as the surrounding buildings grow taller and the city traffic becomes denser.
